dialogos.texto_en: Oh, is this the museum shop?\nDo you want to look for souvenirs?
Yeah, let's do that.\nIs it okay with you, Uesugi-san?
Uh, yeah, sure.\nWe still have plenty of time, after all.
(When everyone gathered, Yotsuba was back to her usual\n self. Although she seemed disappointed earlier,\n I won't rush her here, and follow her pace...)
Look, big bro, look!\nThere are lots of stuffed animals!
Wowww...\nThis is incredible. So many different ones.
Ah! There's a manatee stuffed animal!\nAnd it's holding a carrot!
That's so playful!
Do you both really like manatees that much?
Is this a juvenile whale shark? It's quite small.
Well, it's impossible\nto make a life-sized whale shark stuffed animal.
Oh, this is a clownfish.\nThey're just so colorful and cute.
What's this white, long thing?
It's a stuffed animal of a spotted garden eel, it says.
Oh, this size would be perfect as a body pillow.
...Now that you say that,\nI can only see it as a pillow.
Ah! This one is cute.\nLook, it's a fluffy dolphin!
Dolphins are great too.\nI'm not sure which one to get, though.\nMaybe this one.
Raiha-chan, have you decided what to get?
I'm getting this.\nIt's a stuffed whale shark named 'Jinbei-chan!'
Ahaha, did you already give it a name?
I'm going to get that spotted garden eel and name it 'Futaro.'
Hey, wait a sec.
Then, my clownfish will be named 'Fu-kun.'
Why are these things getting my name?
Look closely.\nThe eyes of this eel\nlook just like yours, Futaro.
It doesn't look like me at all!\nHumans don't have eyes like that!
It doesn't matter what you name a stuffed animal,\nas long as you have an attachment to it. Right, Fu-kun?
Don't make stuffed animals agree with you.
Hey, what are you going to name your dolphin,\nYotsuba-san?
Huh? The name for this dolphin?!
Yeah, you give yours a name, Yotsuba-san.
S-so, this'll be...F%p-2;――
F-...F-F-...\nF-Fluffy Raiha-chan!!
...Fluffy Raiha-chan?
That's the name for the dolphin!\n'Fluffy Raiha-chan!'
Hmm, I see. After all,\ndolphins are the most popular idols in aquariums.\nYou really get that, right, Yotsuba?!
Yes, that's right!\nI thought you would understand, Uesugi-san!
Of course.\nI'm her big brother, after all!
That's right!\nAhaha... *sigh*
The strategy has failed...
We worked hard for this, but it didn't work out.
W-well, I think Yotsuba did her best in her own way.
Even Fu-kun didn't notice.
Yotsuba tends to get carried away\nwhen it comes to Raiha-chan.
This might be harder than I thought...
